The fact that there is no checking account is associated with lower estimated risk, because it is associated with lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan purpose is for a used car aligns with standard financial health metrics, because it aligns with standard financial health metrics, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the checking account balance is negative indicates overdrafts or liquidity constraints, because it indicates overdrafts or liquidity constraints, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 모델 또한 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
대출 목적이 중고차 구매인 경우는 일반적인 재무 건강 지표와 부합하여 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 여겨지며, 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 식별합니다 [2].
계좌 잔액이 음수인 것은 오버드래프트나 유동성 제약을 의미하지만, 모델에서는 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 낮은 신용 위험을 가질 것으로 평가됩니다.
